title: Fail-closed apply default shared across all four surfaces via APPLY_SAFE_DEFAULTS
rationale: Bare am apply was the most common human invocation and previously blindly overwrote a drifted native config (2026-04-15 ~/.claude.json wipe class). Flipping the CLI default to fail-closed closes SEC-4c; a first apply reports unmanaged/in-sync (not drifted) so fresh-init/round-trip UX is unaffected; --force/AM_APPLY_BACKUP remain the escape hatch.
